summary: Hybrid lookup optimization: object lookups for arrays >2 elements, indexOf for smaller arrays. Provides 2-3% improvement while avoiding overhead on empty/small arrays.

Replaced charCodeAt calls with direct character comparisons on lines 86, 99, and 103. All 84 tests pass. Performance decreased by ~5.6% (1,770,924 vs 1,875,212 ops/sec). Modern JS engines appear to optimize charCodeAt better than string indexing for character comparisons in this hot path.
